name: codebase-quiz
description: A three-question interactive skill for learning and maintaining awareness of a codebase.

interface.longDescription: Quiz developers on a repository with three adaptive, evidence-based questions that build codebase awareness without letting the agent do all the learning work.
defaultPrompt: Use $codebase-quiz to quiz me on this repo.
Use $codebase-quiz to test my understanding of the current codebase.
